blended.narrative: Gunstock Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 49°F.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
